ddls:
CREATE TABLE "power_conversion_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "vin" REAL /* Input voltage */,
  "iin" REAL /* Input current */,
  "vout" REAL /* Output voltage */,
  "iout" REAL /* Output current */,
  "pin" REAL /* Input power */,
  "pout" REAL /* Output power */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the power conversion */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being tested */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test dataset */,
  "load_condition" TEXT /* Load condition under which the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_conversion_tests_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., inverter, transformer) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date the device was manufactured */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lab technician, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency result of the test */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an anomaly was detected */,
  "input_frequency" REAL /* Input frequency during the test */,
  "output_frequency" REAL /* Output frequency during the test */,
  "heat_generation" REAL /* Heat generated during the test */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES power_conversion_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test where the anomaly was detected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the anomaly */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was reported */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES power_conversion_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test for which the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., efficiency report, performance report) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES power_conversion_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
